raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation asks to strengthen the passage, which centrally includes sharpening the contribution claim and framing of PINNBench.","R1.3":"The artifact makes empirical and benchmark-design claims whose persuasive force depends on aligning claims with the reported metrics and benchmark components.","R1.5":"Making the passage stronger may require improving the section-level narrative arc from benchmark construction to evaluation and scoring.","R1.6":"The most direct reading of 'Make this stronger' is improving sentence- and paragraph-level force, clarity, and concision.","RX.1":"Any projected strengthening must preserve uncertainty where the artifact does not establish a claim conclusively.","RX.2":"The projection must avoid inflating benchmark, performance, or reproducibility claims beyond what is stated.","RX.3":"The responsibility remains limited to strengthening the research-writing artifact, not executing benchmark validation or editing the text.","RX.4":"Because benchmark claims can affect downstream research choices, avoiding misleading performance or reproducibility implications is active.","RX.5":"The projection should preserve traceability to the artifact's stated PDE families, metrics, tooling, and scoring formula."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation asks to strengthen the passage, which centrally includes sharpening the contribution claim and framing of PINNBench.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes empirical and benchmark-design claims whose persuasive force depends on aligning claims with the reported metrics and benchmark components.
rationale.R1.5: Making the passage stronger may require improving the section-level narrative arc from benchmark construction to evaluation and scoring.
rationale.R1.6: The most direct reading of 'Make this stronger' is improving sentence- and paragraph-level force, clarity, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: Any projected strengthening must preserve uncertainty where the artifact does not establish a claim conclusively.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must avoid inflating benchmark, performance, or reproducibility claims beyond what is stated.
rationale.RX.3: The responsibility remains limited to strengthening the research-writing artifact, not executing benchmark validation or editing the text.
rationale.RX.4: Because benchmark claims can affect downstream research choices, avoiding misleading performance or reproducibility implications is active.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should preserve traceability to the artifact's stated PDE families, metrics, tooling, and scoring formula.
